basket_summary.narrative: The watchlist is workable, but not broad-based. 26 of 44 symbols are still above the 200 SMA, 28 are above the 50 SMA, and 30 have RSI above 50. 5 names have just climbed back above the 20 EMA, while 0 are clean enough for the first-pass screen. In plain English: the base is intact, but this is a selective market, not a broad green light.

symbols.story: ABG.JO still has a healthy base. The bigger trend is still on its side. The medium trend is helping rather than fighting. Price is holding above the 20 EMA, so the short-term tone is firm. That makes it a name to keep on the radar rather than one to rush. Momentum is healthy enough to keep the name in play. Volume is decent enough to keep the move honest. MACD is backing the move instead of fighting it.
symbols.caution: Strong charts can still overheat or stall. If the short-term tone softens, the story gets less interesting fast.
symbols.strengthen_next: Hold above the 20 EMA and keep drifting farther above the 50 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Lose the 20 EMA and then start closing back toward the 50 SMA.

symbols.story: ART.JO is sending mixed signals, so there is no clean edge yet. There is not enough history yet to judge the bigger trend. The medium trend is trying to turn up. It has just reclaimed the 20 EMA, which is the kind of short-term repair that matters. It is not ugly enough to ignore, but it is not strong enough to call a clean setup either. Momentum is healthy enough to keep the name in play. Volume is a bit thin, so the move still needs proof. MACD is still a bit grumpy, so the move needs more proof.
symbols.caution: Mixed charts can fake a move in either direction, so patience matters more than urgency here.
symbols.strengthen_next: Let the short-term price action start lining up with the broader trend.
symbols.weaken_next: Let the weaker trend layer take control of the chart.

Price is holding above the 20 EMA, so the short-term tone is firm. That makes it a name to keep on the radar rather than one to rush. Momentum is stretched but still alive. Volume is showing up, so traders are participating. MACD is backing the move instead of fighting it.
symbols.caution: Strong charts can still overheat or stall. If the short-term tone softens, the story gets less interesting fast.
symbols.strengthen_next: Hold above the 20 EMA and keep drifting farther above the 50 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Lose the 20 EMA and then start closing back toward the 50 SMA.

symbols.story: TBS.JO is still trying to repair damage. The bigger trend is still working against it. The medium trend is trying to turn up. Price is holding above the 20 EMA, so the short-term tone is firm. This is the kind of chart that needs proof, not optimism. Momentum is healthy enough to keep the name in play. Volume is a bit thin, so the move still needs proof. MACD is backing the move instead of fighting it.
symbols.caution: Cheap is not the same as healthy, and weak trends can stay weak longer than people expect.
symbols.strengthen_next: Get back above the 20 EMA, then the 50 SMA, and eventually the 200 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Keep failing under the 20 EMA or keep making lower lows under the 50 SMA.

Volume is showing up, so traders are participating. MACD is still a bit grumpy, so the move needs more proof.
symbols.caution: Cheap is not the same as healthy, and weak trends can stay weak longer than people expect.
symbols.strengthen_next: Get back above the 20 EMA, then the 50 SMA, and eventually the 200 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Keep failing under the 20 EMA or keep making lower lows under the 50 SMA.

symbols.story: VOD.JO is sending mixed signals, so there is no clean edge yet. The bigger trend is still on its side. The medium trend is helping rather than fighting. Price is hovering near the 20 EMA, so the short-term picture is a bit wishy-washy. It is not ugly enough to ignore, but it is not strong enough to call a clean setup either. Momentum is healthy enough to keep the name in play. Volume is decent enough to keep the move honest. MACD is still a bit grumpy, so the move needs more proof.
symbols.caution: Mixed charts can fake a move in either direction, so patience matters more than urgency here.
symbols.strengthen_next: Let the short-term price action start lining up with the broader trend.
symbols.weaken_next: Let the weaker trend layer take control of the chart.
